title: If AI writes code, should the session be part of the commit?
content: GitHub - mandel-macaque/memento: Keep track of you codex sessions per commit Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You signed out in another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You switched accounts on another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. Dismiss alert mandel-macaque / memento Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 4 Star 180 Keep track of you codex sessions per commit License MIT license 180 stars 4 forks Branches Tags Activity Star Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings mandel-macaque/memento Use this GitHub action with your project Add this Action to an existing workflow or create a new one View on Marketplace main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 29 Commits 29 Commits .github/ workflows .github/ workflows dist dist install install scripts/ release scripts/ release skills/ git-memento-workflow skills/ git-memento-workflow src src tests-js tests-js tests tests tools tools .gitignore .gitignore GitMemento.slnx GitMemento.slnx LICENSE LICENSE README.md README.md action.yml action.yml install.sh install.sh package-lock.json package-lock.json package.json package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.json View all files Repository files navigation git-memento git-memento is a Git extension that records the AI coding session used to produce a commit. It runs a commit and then stores a cleaned markdown conversation as a git note on the new commit. Goal Create commits with normal Git flow ( -m or editor). Attach the AI session trace to the commit ( git notes ). Keep provider support extensible (Codex first, others later). Produce human-readable markdown notes. Command Initialize per-repository memento settings: git memento init git memento init codex git memento init claude init stores configuration in local git metadata ( .git/config ) under memento.* . git memento commit < session-id > -m " Normal commit message " git memento commit < session-id > -m " Subject line " -m " Body paragraph " git memento amend -m " Amended subject " git memento amend < new-session-id > -m " Amended subject " -m " Amended body " git memento audit --range main..HEAD --strict git memento doctor Or: git memento commit < session-id > You can pass -m multiple times, and each value is forwarded to git commit in order. When -m is omitted, git commit opens your default editor. amend runs git commit --amend . Without a session id, it copies the note(s) from the previous HEAD onto the amended commit. With a session id, it copies previous note(s) and appends the new fetched session as an additional session entry. A single commit note can contain sessions from different AI providers. Share notes with the repository remote (default: origin ): git memento share-notes git memento share-notes upstream This pushes refs/notes/* and configures lo
title_zh: 如果AI编写代码，提交记录中是否应包含会话信息？
summary_zh: 随着AI辅助编程的普及，由AI生成的代码在提交时是否应附带其创作会话记录，已成为开发者关注的问题。GitHub项目memento为此提供了一个解决方案：它是一个Git扩展工具，旨在将AI编码会话追踪信息与代码提交（commit）关联起来。，memento的核心功能是，在开发者执行常规Git提交流程的同时，自动获取并清理AI编程会话（例如与OpenAI Codex或Anthropic Claude的交互记录），将其以人类可读的Markdown格式保存为Git notes，并附加到对应的提交上。这为代码审计、理解变更背景以及维护可追溯性提供了重要依据。，项目的主要特点包括：首先，它无缝集成到现有Git工作流中，用户可以使用类似`git memento commit <session-id> -m "提交信息"`的命令进行提交，体验与普通`git commit`一致。其次，它支持扩展不同的AI服务提供商（目前优先支持Codex）。再者，它允许单个提交包含来自不同AI提供商的会话记录，并提供了`amend`、`audit`、`doctor`等命令来管理、审查和修复这些笔记。最后，用户可以通过`git memento share-notes`命令将笔记推送到远程仓库，实现团队共享。，该工具通过将AI会话作为元数据与代码版本绑定，有助于提升代码库的透明度和可维护性，特别是在团队协作或需要严格审查AI生成代码的场景中，具有实用价值。项目以MIT许可证开源，开发者可通过GitHub Actions将其集成到现有工作流中。

License MIT license 8.5k stars 487 forks Branches Tags Activity Star Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings AlexsJones/llmfit main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 239 Commits 239 Commits .githooks .githooks .github .github assets assets data data llmfit-core llmfit-core llmfit-desktop llmfit-desktop llmfit-tui llmfit-tui scripts scripts skills/ llmfit-advisor skills/ llmfit-advisor .dockerignore .dockerignore .gitignore .gitignore .release-please-manifest.json .release-please-manifest.json AGENTS.md AGENTS.md CHANGELOG.md CHANGELOG.md CNAME CNAME Cargo.lock Cargo.lock Cargo.toml Cargo.toml Dockerfile Dockerfile LICENSE LICENSE MODELS.md MODELS.md Makefile Makefile README.md README.md demo.gif demo.gif download.gif download.gif home_laptop.png home_laptop.png index.html index.html install.sh install.sh moe.png moe.png View all files Repository files navigation llmfit Hundreds of models & providers. One command to find what runs on your hardware. A terminal tool that right-sizes LLM models to your system's RAM, CPU, and GPU. Detects your hardware, scores each model across quality, speed, fit, and context dimensions, and tells you which ones will actually run well on your machine. Ships with an interactive TUI (default) and a classic CLI mode. Supports multi-GPU setups, MoE architectures, dynamic quantization selection, speed estimation, and local runtime providers (Ollama, llama.cpp, MLX). Sister project: Check out sympozium for managing agents in Kubernetes. Quick install (macOS / Linux) curl -fsSL https://llmfit.axjns.dev/install.sh | sh Downloads the latest release binary from GitHub and installs it to /usr/local/bin (or ~/.local/bin ) Or brew install llmfit Windows users: see the Install section below. Install Cargo (Windows / macOS / Linux) cargo install llmfit If cargo is not installed yet, install Rust via rustup . macOS / Linux Homebrew brew install llmfit Quick install curl -fsSL https://llmfit.axjns.dev/install.sh | sh Downloads the latest release binary from GitHub and installs it to /usr/local/bin (or ~/.local/bin if no sudo). Install to ~/.local/bin without sudo: curl -fsSL https://llmfit.axjns.dev/install.sh | sh -s -- --local From source git clone https://github.com/AlexsJones/llmfit.git cd llmfit cargo build --release # binary is at target/release/ll
title_zh: 根据系统RAM、CPU和GPU配置优化LLM模型规模
summary_zh: 开源工具llmfit发布，旨在根据用户系统的RAM、CPU和GPU资源，为其匹配最合适的LLM模型。该项目提供了数百种模型和多种运行时提供商，用户仅需一条命令即可快速找到能在自身硬件上流畅运行的模型。，llmfit的核心功能是自动检测用户硬件配置，并从质量、速度、适配度和上下文长度等多个维度对模型进行综合评分，最终推荐真正适合当前机器运行的模型。它默认提供交互式的TUI界面，同时也支持经典的CLI模式。，该工具具备多项实用特性：支持多GPU设置和MoE架构；能动态选择量化方案；可进行速度预估；并兼容多种本地运行时提供商，如Ollama、llama.cpp和MLX。其姊妹项目sympozium专注于在Kubernetes中管理AI智能体。，安装方式灵活便捷。macOS和Linux用户可通过一行curl命令快速安装，或使用Homebrew包管理器。Windows用户以及所有平台的开发者也可通过Cargo（Rust包管理器）安装，或直接从源码编译。，总而言之，llmfit解决了开发者在本地部署LLM时面临的模型选择难题，通过智能化的硬件适配与评估，显著降低了使用门槛，提升了本地AI应用的部署效率和运行体验。

title: Why XML tags are so fundamental to Claude
title_zh: 为什么XML标签对Claude如此重要
summary_zh: XML标签对Claude的重要性源于其作为结构化数据格式的核心作用。在大型语言模型（LLM）如Claude的运作中，XML标签提供了清晰、可解析的指令和内容分隔机制，这对于模型准确理解和执行复杂任务至关重要。，Claude等AI模型通过解析输入文本来生成响应。XML标签（如<instruction>、<context>、<question>）能够明确划分不同部分，例如将系统指令、用户提供的背景信息、具体问题或输出格式要求区分开来。这种结构化方式减少了歧义，使模型能更精准地把握用户意图。例如，在提示工程中，使用<thinking>标签可以让Claude先进行内部推理，再将最终答案放入<answer>标签，这提升了响应的逻辑性和准确性。，技术层面上，XML标签支持更复杂的交互模式，如多轮对话中的状态保持、特定内容格式（代码、JSON）的输出约束，以及通过RAG（检索增强生成）集成外部知识时的数据封装。它们为Claude提供了“元指令”，帮助模型在生成过程中遵循严格的规则和结构，这对于开发可靠的应用（如通过API构建智能助手或自动化流程）是不可或缺的。，此外，在Claude的模型训练和微调过程中，XML格式的数据有助于构建高质量的数据集，确保模型学会识别和处理结构化信息。这直接提升了其在代码生成、数据分析、文档解析等任务中的性能。因此，XML标签不仅是与Claude交互的有效工具，更是其实现可靠、可控和高效输出的基础技术要素。

title: Show HN: Logira – eBPF runtime auditing for AI agent runs
content: GitHub - melonattacker/logira: OS-level runtime auditing for unpredictable automation. Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You signed out in another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You switched accounts on another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. Dismiss alert melonattacker / logira Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 2 Star 37 OS-level runtime auditing for unpredictable automation. License Apache-2.0 license 37 stars 2 forks Branches Tags Activity Star Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings melonattacker/logira main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 35 Commits 35 Commits .github .github cmd cmd collector collector docs docs examples/ rules examples/ rules internal internal packaging packaging .gitignore .gitignore AGENTS.md AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md CLAUDE.md LICENSE LICENSE Makefile Makefile README.md README.md go.mod go.mod go.sum go.sum install.sh install.sh View all files Repository files navigation logira OS-level runtime auditing for unpredictable automation. logira is an observe-only Linux CLI that records runtime exec , file , and net events via eBPF. It helps you see what actually happened during AI agent runs and other forms of automation, with per-run local storage for auditing, post-run review, search, and detection triage. What is logira? eBPF-based runtime collection of process execution, file activity, and network activity. cgroup v2 run-scoped tracking, so events can be attributed to a single audited run. Per-run local storage in JSONL and SQLite for timeline review and fast querying. Built-in default detection rules, with optional custom YAML rules. Observe-only by design: logira records and detects, but does not enforce or block. Why logira? Audit what an AI agent actually executed, changed, and connected to during a run (for example, codex --yolo or claude --dangerously-skip-permissions ). Keep a trustworthy execution trail that does not depend on the agent’s own textual narrative. Detect risky behavior patterns such as credential access, destructive commands, persistence changes, and suspicious network egress. Review and share forensic evidence after a run using structured event history and detection results. Add lightweight runtime auditing to local automation or CI tasks without changing workload behavior. Default Detections logira includes an opinionated, observe-only default ruleset aimed at auditing AI agent runs. You can also append your own per-run rules YAML with logira run --rules <file> . Credential and secrets writes: ~/.ssh , ~/.aws , kube/gcloud/docker config, .netrc , .git-credentials , registry creds. Sensitive credential reads: SSH private keys, AWS credentials/config, kubeconfig, docker config, .netrc , .git-credentials . Persistence and config changes: writ
title_zh: Show HN：Logira——AI代理运行的eBPF运行时审计
summary_zh: Logira 是一个基于 eBPF 的 Linux 命令行工具，专为不可预测的自动化任务（尤其是 AI 代理运行）提供操作系统级别的运行时审计。它通过 eBPF 技术，以仅观察（observe-only）的方式记录进程执行（exec）、文件活动（file）和网络活动（net）等运行时事件，帮助用户清晰了解 AI 代理（如 Codex、Claude 等）或其他自动化脚本在实际运行中究竟执行了什么操作、更改了哪些文件以及建立了何种网络连接。，该工具的核心功能与特点包括：利用 cgroup v2 实现运行范围（run-scoped）的跟踪，确保所有事件都能归属于单次被审计的运行任务；每次运行的事件数据会以 JSONL 和 SQLite 格式存储在本地，便于进行时间线审查和快速查询；内置了一套针对 AI 代理运行审计的默认检测规则集，同时也支持用户通过 YAML 文件添加自定义规则；其设计原则是仅记录和检测，而不进行强制执行或拦截，因此不会改变被审计工作负载的行为。，Logira 的主要价值在于：为 AI 代理运行（例如使用 `--yolo` 或 `--dangerously-skip-permissions` 等参数时）提供独立于代理自身文本叙述的可信执行痕迹，用于事后审计、审查和取证；能够检测高风险行为模式，例如凭据访问（读取/写入 SSH 私钥、AWS 凭证、kubeconfig、.netrc 等）、破坏性命令、持久化配置更改以及可疑的网络出口流量；可以作为一种轻量级的运行时审计方案，无缝集成到本地自动化任务或 CI/CD 流程中，增强安全可见性。项目已在 GitHub 开源，采用 Apache-2.0 许可证。

title: Claude dethrones ChatGPT as top U.S. app after Pentagon saga
title_zh: Claude取代ChatGPT成为美国最受欢迎应用 五角大楼风波后登顶
summary_zh: 在经历五角大楼数据安全风波后，Anthropic公司开发的AI助手Claude在美国iOS应用商店免费应用榜上超越ChatGPT，首次登顶榜首。这一变化发生在OpenAI的ChatGPT因与五角大楼合作可能涉及武器化AI的争议而面临审查之际，而Anthropic则公开承诺避免将Claude用于军事用途，强调了其“负责任AI”的定位。，Claude应用的迅速崛起得益于其近期推出的iOS版本以及更广泛的免费可用性。与ChatGPT相比，Claude 3系列模型（如Haiku、Sonnet和Opus）在多项基准测试中展示了强大的竞争力，尤其在分析、代码生成和多模态理解方面表现突出。其核心特点包括支持高达200K的上下文窗口，能处理大量文本并进行复杂推理，且在设计上注重安全性与可控性，减少了有害输出。，此次排名变化反映了用户对AI工具可访问性、实用性和伦理考量的日益关注。Claude通过提供强大的免费服务和明确的安全准则吸引了大量用户，而ChatGPT则因部分高级功能收费及最近的争议面临挑战。这一市场动态表明，AI助手领域的竞争正从单纯的技术性能扩展到信任度、透明度和企业责任层面。

title: AI is making junior devs useless
content: AI is Making Junior Devs Useless - Be a Better Dev Start Here AWS Articles My Courses Learning Resources 5 AWS Project Ideas About Me Archives March 2026 February 2026 January 2026 March 2025 February 2025 May 2024 January 2024 December 2023 November 2023 October 2023 September 2023 July 2023 June 2023 May 2023 April 2023 January 2023 December 2022 November 2022 October 2022 September 2022 August 2022 July 2022 June 2022 May 2022 April 2022 March 2022 February 2022 January 2022 December 2021 November 2021 October 2021 September 2021 August 2021 July 2021 June 2021 May 2021 April 2021 March 2021 February 2021 January 2021 December 2020 November 2020 October 2020 September 2020 AI is Making Junior Devs Useless Total 0 Shares 0 0 0 So I got this comment on my last video and it genuinely stopped me in my tracks. It was from @Thiccolo and it reads: “For someone like you, who likely has years of experience without LLMs, your brain totally understands good code/bad code, good architecture, and just general intuition around code and systems. LLMs must be an absolute gamechanger. But for someone like me who is starting out in this field, how am I supposed to build the years of experience and intuition that comes from manually writing code and building systems when companies are expecting AI to be used from here on out?” The number of upvotes this got told me everything. A lot of you are feeling this exact thing and not really talking about it. So let’s talk about it. Here’s the real problem. AI is making it really easy to build what I’d call shallow competence . You’re shipping fast, your manager’s happy, things look good on paper. But the moment someone in a code review asks you “hey why did you go with this approach?” and you freeze. Because honestly? You don’t know. The AI gave it to you and you just ran with it. Does this sound familiar? That’s a problem. And it’s going to catch up with you. To be clear, the reason experienced developers are valuable isn’t because we write code faster than you. It’s because we’ve spent years learning what not to do. We’ve made terrible architectural decisions and had to live with them. We’ve been paged at 2am because of something we shipped that seemed totally fine. That failure pattern recognition is what companies are actually paying for. And right now, a lot of junior devs are accidentally skipping all of that. When I was learning, and I know this is going to sound like “back in my day” type stuff, struggle was just a given. You had a bug, you read the stack trace, you traced through the code, you dug through the logs. That was just the job. Nobody was handing you answers. And as frustrating as that was, it’s exactly how I built the intuition I still rely on today. Okay so what do you actually do about this? I put together 5 strategies that I think can genuinely help. And I’ll be straight with you, some of them are more practical, some of them are more mindset-y. But all of them matter. 1. Learn the fundamentals —
title_zh: AI正在让初级开发者变得无用
summary_zh: 一篇关于AI对初级开发者影响的文章引发了广泛讨论。文章指出，当前AI工具（如LLM）的普及，使得初级开发者能够快速生成代码并交付任务，表面上提升了效率，但这可能导致一种“浅层能力”的形成。核心问题在于，开发者可能过度依赖AI输出，而不理解代码背后的设计决策、架构权衡或潜在隐患。当被问及“为何选择此方案”时，他们可能无法给出有深度的回答，因为他们跳过了通过亲手调试、排查错误和承担错误决策后果来积累关键经验的过程。，资深开发者的价值并非仅在于编码速度，而在于多年实践形成的“失败模式识别”能力——即知道哪些做法会导致问题，以及如何构建稳健、可维护的系统。这种直觉和判断力来自于处理生产环境事故、进行深夜故障排查和反思不良架构决策的艰苦经历。而目前，许多初级开发者在使用AI工具时，无意中绕过了这些至关重要的学习环节。，为此，文章提出了应对策略。首要且根本的一点是夯实基础。开发者必须深入理解计算机科学基本原理、数据结构和算法，而不仅仅是调用API。这包括亲手编写代码、不依赖AI完成核心学习任务，并确保能向他人清晰解释自己的代码。其他建议还包括：将AI视为协作伙伴而非答案机器，主动进行代码审查和解释，承担能带来成长痛点的项目，以及培养系统性思维。最终目标是利用AI增强能力，而非让其取代构建深层技术专长所必需的挣扎与学习过程。

Please check the information and proceed with caution. Note We've got a whole dedicated organization @proj-airi for all the sub-projects born from Project AIRI. Check it out! RAG, memory system, embedded database, icons, Live2D utilities, and more! Tip We have a translation project on
title_zh: moeru-ai/airi - 💖🧸 自托管、您专属的Grok伴侣，一个承载着虚拟伴侣灵魂的容器，将赛博生命带入我们的世界，旨在达到Neuro-sama的高度。支持实时语音聊天、玩《我的世界》和《异星工厂》。兼容网页版、macOS和Windows系统。
summary_zh: 项目AIRI是一个开源的自托管AI伴侣平台，旨在成为“灵魂容器”，让用户创造并交互属于自己的虚拟角色（如“waifu”或网络生命体），其愿景是达到类似知名虚拟主播Neuro-sama的互动高度。该项目支持实时语音聊天，并能通过集成在《我的世界》（Minecraft）和《异星工厂》（Factorio）等游戏中与用户互动。它提供Web版本以及macOS和Windows的本地客户端支持。，核心功能上，AIRI致力于重建一个高度沉浸式的虚拟角色生态系统。它不仅是一个聊天机器人，更是一个可深度定化的“灵魂”载体，允许用户赋予AI角色个性、记忆和持续的存在感。技术层面，项目采用了RAG（检索增强生成）技术、记忆系统和嵌入式数据库来增强AI的上下文理解和长期交互能力。同时，项目集成了Live2D等工具，以丰富角色的视觉表现。，该项目在GitHub上以MIT许可证开源，拥有活跃的社区（如Discord服务器）和多语言支持。开发者明确警告，项目并未发行任何官方加密货币或代币，提醒用户注意甄别信息。此外，围绕AIRI核心项目已衍生出一个专门的组织（@proj-airi），用于管理其诞生的各类子项目，包括实用工具和扩展功能。

title: K-Dense-AI/claude-scientific-skills - A set of ready to use Agent Skills for research, science, engineering, analysis, finance and writing.
content: GitHub - K-Dense-AI/claude-scientific-skills: A set of ready to use Agent Skills for research, science, engineering, analysis, finance and writing. Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You signed out in another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You switched accounts on another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. Dismiss alert K-Dense-AI / claude-scientific-skills Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 1.2k Star 10.8k A set of ready to use Agent Skills for research, science, engineering, analysis, finance and writing. k-dense.ai License MIT license 10.8k stars 1.2k forks Branches Tags Activity Star Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings K-Dense-AI/claude-scientific-skills main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 326 Commits 326 Commits .claude-plugin .claude-plugin .github/ workflows .github/ workflows docs docs scientific-skills scientific-skills .gitattributes .gitattributes .gitignore .gitignore LICENSE.md LICENSE.md README.md README.md View all files Repository files navigation Claude Scientific Skills A comprehensive collection of 148+ ready-to-use scientific and research skills (now including financial/SEC research, U.S. Treasury fiscal data, OFR Hedge Fund Monitor, and Alpha Vantage market data) for any AI agent that supports the open Agent Skills standard, created by K-Dense . Works with Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, and more . Transform your AI agent into a research assistant capable of executing complex multi-step scientific workflows across biology, chemistry, medicine, and beyond. The demo above shows K-Dense Web — the hosted platform built on top of these skills. Claude Scientific Skills is the open-source skill collection; K-Dense Web is the full AI co-scientist platform with more power and zero setup. These skills enable your AI agent to seamlessly work with specialized scientific libraries, databases, and tools across multiple scientific domains. While the agent can use any Python package or API on its own, these explicitly defined skills provide curated documentation and examples that make it significantly stronger and more reliable for the workflows below: 🧬 Bioinformatics & Genomics - Sequence analysis, single-cell RNA-seq, gene regulatory networks, variant annotation, phylogenetic analysis 🧪 Cheminformatics & Drug Discovery - Molecular property prediction, virtual screening, ADMET analysis, molecular docking, lead optimization 🔬 Proteomics & Mass Spectrometry - LC-MS/MS processing, peptide identification, spectral matching, protein quantification 🏥 Clinical Research & Precision Medicine - Clinical trials, pharmacogenomics, variant interpretation, drug safety, clinical decision support, treatment planning 🧠 Healthcare AI & Clinical ML - EHR analysis, physiological signal processing, m
title_zh: K-Dense-AI/claude-scientific-skills - 一套面向研究、科学、工程、分析、金融和写作的即用型智能体技能集。
summary_zh: GitHub项目K-Dense-AI/claude-scientific-skills是一个开源的科学技能集合，包含超过148个即用型Agent Skills，专为研究、科学、工程、分析、金融和写作领域设计。该项目基于开放的Agent Skills标准，适用于支持该标准的任何AI agent，包括Cursor、Claude Code、Codex等平台。其核心价值在于将AI agent转化为能够执行复杂多步骤科学工作流程的研究助手，覆盖生物学、化学、医学等多个学科。，项目提供了涵盖多个专业领域的技能模块：在生物信息学与基因组学方面，支持序列分析、单细胞RNA测序、基因调控网络、变异注释和系统发育分析；在化学信息学与药物发现领域，包括分子属性预测、虚拟筛选、ADMET分析、分子对接和先导化合物优化；在蛋白质组学与质谱分析中，涉及LC-MS/MS数据处理、肽段鉴定、谱图匹配和蛋白质定量；在临床研究与精准医疗方面，涵盖临床试验、药物基因组学、变异解读、药物安全性和临床决策支持；在医疗AI与临床机器学习中，支持电子健康记录分析和生理信号处理。，此外，项目近期扩展了金融研究功能，整合了SEC研究、美国财政部财政数据、OFR对冲基金监控和Alpha Vantage市场数据等资源。这些技能使AI agent能够无缝调用专业科学库、数据库和工具，虽然agent可自行使用任何Python包或API，但该项目通过精心整理的文档和示例，显著提升了工作流程的可靠性和效率。，该项目作为开源技能集合，与其商业平台K-Dense Web形成互补：前者提供基础技能模块，后者是基于这些技能构建的完整AI科研协作平台，具备更强大的功能且无需配置。该项目采用MIT许可证，在GitHub上已获得10.8k星标和1.2k分支，体现了其在科研自动化社区中的广泛影响力。

Superset is a turbocharged terminal that allows you to run any CLI coding agents along with the tools to 10x your development workflow. Run multiple agents simultaneously without context switching overhead Isolate each task in its own git worktree so agents don't interfere with each other Monitor all your agents from one place and get notified when they need attention Review changes quickly with built-in diff viewer and editor Wait less, ship more. Features Feature Description Parallel Execution Run 10+ coding agents simultaneously on your machine Worktree Isolation Each task gets its own branch and working directory Agent Monitoring Track agent status and get notified when changes are ready Built-in Diff Viewer Inspect and edit agent changes without leaving the app Workspace Presets Automate env setup, dependency installation, and more Universal Compatibility Works with any CLI agent that runs in a terminal Quick Context Switching Jump between tasks as they need your attention IDE Integration Open any workspace in your favorite editor with one click Supported Agents Superset works with any CLI-based coding agent, including: Agent Status
title_zh: superset-sh/superset - AI 智能体时代的集成开发环境 - 在您的机器上运行 Claude Code、Codex 等智能体大军
summary_zh: Superset是一个专为AI智能体时代设计的集成开发环境（IDE），它本质上是一个功能增强的终端，允许开发者在本地机器上并行运行多个基于命令行的AI编码智能体，如Claude Code、Codex等，从而极大提升开发工作流效率。，该项目的核心价值在于解决了同时运行多个AI编码助手时的上下文切换开销和任务干扰问题。其关键功能包括：支持并行执行，可同时运行10个以上的编码智能体；提供工作树隔离，每个任务都在独立的Git工作树和分支中进行，确保智能体之间互不干扰；内置统一的监控面板，可集中追踪所有智能体的状态，并在需要人工关注时发送通知。，Superset还集成了代码差异查看器和编辑器，开发者无需离开应用即可快速审查和修改智能体生成的代码变更。它支持工作区预设，能自动化环境设置和依赖安装等流程。该工具具有广泛的兼容性，可与任何在终端中运行的CLI智能体配合使用，并支持一键将工作区在用户偏好的外部IDE中打开，实现快速上下文切换。，通过将AI智能体任务隔离在独立的环境中并集中管理，Superset旨在减少开发者的等待时间，实现“等待更少，交付更多”的高效开发模式。项目已在GitHub上开源，提供了详细的文档和支持。

title_zh: Claude Code、OpenAI Codex 赠送 20 美元余额，楼层抽奖 100 美元余额，可接 OpenClaw🦞龙虾
summary_zh: VBCode中转站平台在V2EX论坛发布推广，宣布为新老用户提供余额赠送及抽奖活动，并介绍其核心AI服务。平台官方地址为https://vbcode.io。，平台目前主要提供三项AI模型中转服务：，1. Claude Code – AWS（逆向渠道）：倍率为0.35，支持Claude Opus 4.6和Sonnet 4.6模型，具备网络搜索、缓存和深度思考功能。，2. Claude Code – Max（官方Max账户号池）：倍率为1.2，使用官方Max号池。平台另提供带售后的官方渠道成品账号资源，如200美元和100美元的Max账号。，3. Codex 5.3：倍率为0.25。，平台推出用户福利活动：，* 新用户福利：V2EX新注册用户在本帖回复其注册ID（例如：ID: 123），即可直接获得20美元余额。已在上一贴回复并领取过20美元的用户，再次回复可获得5美元余额。未注册账户的用户可加群联系获取10美元余额。，* 抽奖活动：设立100美元兑换码作为奖品。抽奖将于2026年3月6日15:00截止，规则为：取当日A股沪指收盘点位整数部分，对截止时间前总回复楼层数取模，所得楼层即为中奖楼层。若抽中楼主楼层，则自动顺延至下一楼。，帖子中，楼主（vla）已对前期回复的用户进行了余额发放（新用户20美元，老用户5美元），并持续与用户互动，例如解答关于Cloudflare检查的登录问题。大量用户已回复其ID参与活动。，此外，帖子标题提及“可接OpenClaw🦞龙虾”，暗示平台可能支持或可对接OpenClaw相关服务。

title: GPT-5.4据传下周上线！200万上下文窗口+持久化状态，告别频繁遗忘
title_zh: GPT-5.4据传下周上线！200万上下文窗口+持久化状态，告别频繁遗忘
